DamageMeter.name: 皮皮统计: Skada
DamageMeter.changelog: 重新打包发布 zip，移除 legacy mod_manifest.json 修复游戏菜单里的重复模组条目
changelog_detail: 游戏 v0.99+ 起 <ModId>.json 是唯一的外部 root manifest，但 mod loader 依然会扫描 legacy mod_manifest.json —— 同目录两份 manifest 会被 loader 各自注册为独立模组条目，游戏菜单里就出现同名的红色「已加载」坏条目。
上一版发布 zip 里同时带了两份 manifest。虽然 ModManager.ps1 安装/更新时会调用 Remove-LegacyExternalManifest 清理玩家目录，但 zip 里还带着 mod_manifest.json，紧跟的 Copy-Item 又把它复制回来，等于白清理。
本版重新打包的 zip 只含 <Mod>.json + DLL + PCK，不含 mod_manifest.json。没有代码变更。从上一版更新过来时，ModManager 会删掉玩家目录里残留的 mod_manifest.json，重复条目消失。
DamageMeter.changelog_en: repackage release zip without legacy mod_manifest.json to fix duplicate mod entry in game menu
changelog_detail_en: Game v0.99+ introduced <ModId>.json as the sole external root manifest. The mod loader still scans for legacy mod_manifest.json - so when a deployed folder contains both, the loader registers them as two separate mod entries and the game menu shows a duplicate red 'already loaded' row for that mod.

Releases up to and including the previous version shipped both manifests in the zip. Even though ModManager.ps1's install/update path calls Remove-LegacyExternalManifest to clean the target directory, the cleanup was undone because the zip still contained mod_manifest.json and the subsequent Copy-Item step re-deposited it.

This release ships a repackaged zip that contains only <Mod>.json + DLL + PCK. No code changes. Updating from the previous version will trigger ModManager to remove the old mod_manifest.json from the player's game folder and the duplicate entry disappears.

SpeedX.name: 皮皮极速: SpeedX
SpeedX.changelog: 共享 STS2 v0.103/v0.104 兼容层
changelog_detail: 将跨版本 CombatState/Hook 反射兜底迁移到所有目标模组共用的 Sts2Compat 兼容层。
改为使用旧版兼容的 STS2 引用路径编译，避免 DLL 绑定到当前 Steam 分支。
新增 IL 静态兼容检查，提前发现 v0.103.2 与 v0.104.0 签名不同的直接调用。
changelog_detail_en: Moved cross-version CombatState/Hook reflection into the shared Sts2Compat facade used by all target mods.
Compiled against the legacy-compatible STS2 reference path so the DLL no longer depends on the currently installed Steam branch.
Added static IL compatibility checking to catch direct calls to APIs that differ between v0.103.2 and v0.104.0.

RemoveMultiplayerPlayerLimit.name: Remove Multiplayer Player Limit
RemoveMultiplayerPlayerLimit.changelog: 适配 v0.99 beta 新 mod 结构
changelog_detail: 新增 v0.99 格式 manifest（外部 JSON + id + affects_gameplay）
多人联机 API 无破坏性变更，Harmony patches 全部兼容

Rewind.name: 皮皮倒带: Rewind
Rewind.changelog: 共享 STS2 v0.103/v0.104 兼容层
changelog_detail: 将倒带使用的 CombatState、Hook.AfterCardChangedPiles、战斗出牌阶段、读档重建等兼容封装迁移到共享 Sts2Compat。
继续保持 PowerCmd.Apply 诊断补丁与 RunSaveManager.SaveRun 补丁在 v0.103.2/v0.104.0 双版本下的重载安全。
新增 IL 静态兼容检查，防止后续再次直接绑定到 ICombatState 扩宽后的 API。
changelog_detail_en: Moved Rewind's CombatState, Hook.AfterCardChangedPiles, play-phase, and saved-run setup shims into the shared Sts2Compat facade.
Kept PowerCmd.Apply diagnostics and RunSaveManager.SaveRun patches overload-safe across v0.103.2 and v0.104.0.
Added static IL compatibility checking to prevent future direct bindings to widened ICombatState APIs.

ModConfig.name: 皮皮配置: ModConfig

QuickLink.name: 皮皮快连: QuickLink
QuickLink.changelog: 使用固定 STS2 兼容编译基线
changelog_detail: 项目改用共享的 STS2 兼容编译属性，并源码链接 Sts2Compat 兼容层。
检查点保存补丁继续显式绑定 SaveRun(AbstractRoom)，避免 v0.104 新增重载导致 Harmony 歧义。
将 QuickLink 纳入 IL 静态兼容检查，方便后续 STS2 beta 更新时提前发现问题。
QuickLink.changelog_en: Use fixed STS2 compatibility build baseline
changelog_detail_en: Switched the project to the shared STS2 compatibility build properties and source-linked Sts2Compat facade.
Kept the checkpoint save Harmony patch explicitly bound to SaveRun(AbstractRoom) to avoid v0.104 overload ambiguity.
Included QuickLink in the static IL compatibility checker for future STS2 beta updates.
